title: desmodium spirale var. exiguum
intro: Desmodium spirale var. exiguum, also known as the "slender tick trefoil" or "tick clover," is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and itching, and treating digestive issues. Desmodium spirale var. exiguum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or infusing its leaves in oil for topical use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
